name: git-commit
description: Diff-aware Git commit workflow for Codex.

interface.shortDescription: Draft, commit, and push Git changes
interface.longDescription: Git Commit inspects the current worktree, stages changes, drafts a commit message with gix, commits all tracked and untracked work, and pushes when the remote target is clear.
defaultPrompt: Use Git Commit to commit and push current changes.
